$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-actions/auto-fetch-all-stats
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.text:
<!-- Only fetch aggregate stats after the server probe has confirmed availability. -->
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/api-status]get[text]match[available]]">
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]!is[blank]]">
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-http-request"
  url={{{ [[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]addsuffix[/cpl/stats?top=200]] }}}
  method="GET"
  oncompletion="<$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/all-plugin-stats' text=<<data>> type='application/json'/>"/>
</$list>
</$list>

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-actions/auto-fetch-auth-state
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.text:
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/server-type]get[text]match[server]]">
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]!is[blank]]">
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-http-request"
  url={{{ [[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]addsuffix[/cpl/auth/config]] }}}
  method="GET"
  oncompletion="""<$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/auth-config-response' text=<<data>> type='application/json'/>
  <$list filter='[<status>compare:number:gteq[200]compare:number:lt[300]]'>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/github-client-id' text={{{ [<data>jsonget[githubClientId]trim[]] }}}/>
  </$list>
  <$list filter='[<status>compare:number:lt[200]] [<status>compare:number:gteq[300]] +[limit[1]]'>
    <$action-deletetiddler $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/github-client-id'/>
  </$list>"""/>
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-http-request"
  url={{{ [[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]addsuffix[/cpl/auth/status]] }}}
  method="GET"
  oncompletion="""<$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/auth-status-response' text=<<data>> type='application/json'/>
  <$list filter='[<status>compare:number:gteq[200]compare:number:lt[300]] [<data>jsonget[authenticated]match[true]] +[count[]compare:number:eq[2]]'>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/user-status' text='authenticated'/>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/user' text={{{ [<data>jsonget[user]else[{}]] }}} type='application/json'/>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/is-admin' text={{{ [<data>jsonget[isAdmin]match[true]then[yes]else[no]] }}}/>
  </$list>
  <$list filter='[<status>compare:number:lt[200]] [<status>compare:number:gteq[300]] [<data>jsonget[authenticated]!match[true]] +[limit[1]]'>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/user-status' text='anonymous'/>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/is-admin' text='no'/>
    <$action-deletetiddler $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/user'/>
  </$list>"""/>
</$list>
</$list>

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-actions/auto-fetch-plugin-activity
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.text:
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/server-type]get[text]match[server]]">
<$let pluginTitle={{{ [[$:/HistoryList]get[current-tiddler]get[cpl.title]!is[blank]] [[$:/HistoryList]get[current-tiddler]tag[$:/tags/PluginWiki]get[title]!is[blank]] +[limit[1]] }}}>
<$list filter="[<pluginTitle>!is[blank]]">
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-http-request"
  url={{{ [[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]addsuffix[/cpl/comments/]] [<pluginTitle>encodeuricomponent[]] +[join[]] }}}
  method="GET"
  var-storeTiddler={{{ [<pluginTitle>addprefix[$:/temp/CPL-Server/comments/]] }}}
  var-storePluginTitle=<<pluginTitle>>
  oncompletion="<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<storeTiddler>> text=<<data>> type='application/json' plugin-title=<<storePluginTitle>>/>"/>
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-http-request"
  url={{{ [[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]addsuffix[/cpl/changelog/]] [<pluginTitle>encodeuricomponent[]] +[join[]] }}}
  method="GET"
  var-storeTiddler={{{ [<pluginTitle>addprefix[$:/temp/CPL-Server/plugin-changelog/]] }}}
  var-storePluginTitle=<<pluginTitle>>
  oncompletion="<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<storeTiddler>> text=<<data>> type='application/json' plugin-title=<<storePluginTitle>>/>"/>
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-http-request"
  url={{{ [[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]addsuffix[/cpl/compatibility/]] [<pluginTitle>encodeuricomponent[]] +[join[]] }}}
  method="GET"
  var-storeTiddler={{{ [<pluginTitle>addprefix[$:/temp/CPL-Server/compatibility/]] }}}
  var-storePluginTitle=<<pluginTitle>>
  oncompletion="<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<storeTiddler>> text=<<data>> type='application/json' plugin-title=<<storePluginTitle>>/>"/>
</$list>
</$let>
</$list>

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-actions/auto-fetch-plugin-index
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.text:
<!-- Only auto-load when inside the CPL layout, auto-load is enabled, and the index is not already present. -->
<$list filter="[[$:/layout]get[text]match[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/layout/layout]]">
<$list filter="[{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-load-database-in-cpl-layout}match[yes]]">
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/plugins-index]!is[tiddler]]">
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-http-request"
  url={{{ [[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-static-repo]get[text]addsuffix[/index.json]] }}}
  method="GET"
  oncompletion="""<$list filter='[<status>compare:number:gteq[200]compare:number:lt[300]]'>
  <$action-sendmessage $message="cpl-process-plugin-index" data=<<data>>/>
</$list>
<$list filter='[<status>compare:number:lt[200]] [<status>compare:number:gteq[300]] +[limit[1]]'>
  <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Repo/getting-plugins-index' text={{{ [<error>!is[blank]then<error>] [<data>!is[blank]then<data>] [<statusText>!is[blank]then<statusText>] +[limit[1]] }}}$/>
</$list>"""/>
</$list>
</$list>
</$list>

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-actions/auto-fetch-update-json
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.text:
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-http-request"

<$list filter='[<status>compare:number:lt[200]] [<status>compare:number:gteq[300]] +[limit[1]]'>

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-actions/auto-probe-server
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/background-act.text:
<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]!is[blank]]">
<$action-sendmessage $message="tm-http-request"
  url={{{ [[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]addsuffix[/cpl/stats/]] [[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/__probe__]encodeuricomponent[]] +[join[]] }}}
  method="GET"
  oncompletion="""<$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/probe-result' text=<<data>> type='application/json'/>
  <$list filter='[<status>compare:number:gteq[200]compare:number:lt[300]]'>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Repo/server-type' text='server'/>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Repo/api-status' text='available'/>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Repo/server-message' text='CPL server is available.'/>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/auth-refresh-token' text={{{ [<now "0hh:0mm:0ss.XYZ"]] }}}/>
  </$list>
  <$list filter='[<status>compare:number:lt[200]] [<status>compare:number:gteq[300]] +[limit[1]]'>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Repo/server-type' text='unreachable'/>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Repo/api-status' text='unavailable'/>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Repo/server-message' text={{{ [<error>!is[blank]then<error>] [<statusText>!is[blank]then<statusText>] [[$:/temp/CPL-Server/api-base]get[text]!is[blank]then[CPL server is unreachable.]] +[limit[1]] }}}/>
    <$action-deletetiddler $filter='[[$:/temp/CPL-Server/github-client-id]] [[$:/temp/CPL-Server/user]]'/>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/user-status' text='anonymous'/>
    <$action-setfield $tiddler='$:/temp/CPL-Server/is-admin' text='no'/>
  </$list>"""/>
</$list>

<$list filter="[[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/server-type]get[text]match[server]] [[$:/temp/CPL-Repo/install-plugin-status]get[text]match[success]] +[count[]compare:number:eq[2]]">

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/docs/changelog.caption: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[更新日志]else[Changelog]] }}} />
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/docs/changelog.subtitle: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[CPL 更新日志]else[CPL Changelog]] }}} />
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/docs/changelog.text:
! 2026.06.23

* 修复 BackgroundAction 在 Node.js 服务端执行的问题：所有 CPL 后台任务现在只在浏览器端运行
* 删除 `server-init.ts` 中自动创建 `$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-static-repo` 和 `current-server-repo` 用户条目的逻辑，改为依赖插件 shadow tiddler 默认值
* 镜像类型检测和服务器配置同步拆分为两个独立的后台任务，避免互相等待
* 收紧自动加载数据库的触发条件：仅在 CPL layout、开启自动加载、且尚未加载索引时执行
* 收紧服务器统计信息拉取：仅在探测到服务器可用（`api-status` 为 `available`）后才请求
* 收紧插件活动数据拉取：仅在当前条目是插件（含 `cpl.title` 或 `$:/tags/PluginWiki`）时触发，不再在每次导航历史变化时执行
* 新增单元测试覆盖后台任务平台限制、解耦逻辑和触发条件

! 2026.06.14

* 插件详情 modal 新增版本选择器，可以从历史版本中选择安装
* 插件数据库列表项现在整块可点击，点击后在 modal 中展示插件元信息，不再导航到可能不存在的插件条目
* 修复从 CPL 静态镜像安装插件时请求 URL 多出 `/plugins/` 导致 `__meta__.json` 和插件 JSON 404 的问题

! 2026.06.13

* 修复插件数据库列表不显示的问题
* 修复插件卡片 Install 按钮左侧出现多余 “>>” 的问题
* 修复插件列表的双重嵌套和多余边框：列表项外层改用 `cpl-plugin-list-item`，移除容器 `cpl-plugin-info-box` 的边框和背景色
* 评论和兼容性报告改为仅屏蔽模式：移除客户端的待审核界面、通过/拒绝/删除按钮和“待审核”徽章
* 简化评论中心文案：登录提示改为“登录后即可发表评论”，提交成功提示改为“评论已提交”

! 2026.06.12

* Architecture overhaul: Wikitext is now the single entry point for all logic — every user action and network request originates in Wikitext; TypeScript is reduced to pure algorithmic modules that register message handlers and respond via `rootWidget.addEventListener`
* Eliminated all RPC round-trips: BackgroundActions no longer proxy button clicks through request tiddlers; buttons call procedures or send messages directly (e.g. rating stars, moderation buttons, comment submit, logout)
* Removed `core.ts` (the last central controller) — install/index/update/search/download each self-start as independent modules
* Deleted 6 dead files: `static-mirror-fetch.ts` (~100 lines), `comment-processor.ts` (~120 lines), `build-status-poll.ts` (~110 lines), `build-status-badge.tid`, `auto-fetch-build-status.tid`, `download-plugin.ts`
* Removed iframe postMessage bridge (~180 lines) — all three mirrors (Netlify, GitHub Pages, cpl.tidgi.fun) support CORS; repo access now uses Wikitext `tm-http-request` exclusively
* Replaced `$tw.cpl` JS API with Wikitext `cpl-process-plugin-index` / `cpl-process-update-json` message handlers; `$tw.cpl` reduced to empty stub for e2e backward-compat
* Comment views now use native `jsonindexes[]` / `jsonget[]` filter operators instead of a JS comment-to-tiddler pre-processor
* Replaced all `$action-setfield` + BackgroundAction refresh-token RPC with procedures: `fetch-all-stats`, `fetch-plugin-activity`, `fetch-comments`
* `install.ts` and `plugin-index.ts` search changed to `rootWidget.addEventListener` — view buttons send `cpl-install-plugin-request` / `cpl-search-plugins` messages directly
* Removed auto-update timer — update check now fires only when user enters the Updates tab
* Flattened startup directory structure: merged types, eliminated `api-client/` and `core/` sub-directories
* Renamed BackgroundActions for clarity: `auto-load-database` → `auto-fetch-plugin-index`, `auto-check-updates` → `auto-fetch-update-json`; deleted duplicate `auto-check-updates-on-layout`
* Cleaned up constants: removed 16 unused tiddler title constants
* Fixed TID formatting: removed redundant `created`/`modified`/`type`/`\whitespace trim` from all BackgroundActions
* Fixed view rendering: missing `\import` for procedures causing stray `>>` characters; unbalanced `</$list>` tags; nested `<select>` onClick quote collision in database mirror dropdown
* Fixed CPL-Server crash: replaced `new URL()` with manual query-string parsing in `stats/all` and `download-plugin` routes (TW sandbox does not provide `URL`)
* CSS polish: suppressed TW default `tc-tab-content` borders/shadows inside CPL layout; added `border:none` to plugin cards for cleaner list appearance
* Moderation model changed from pre-approval to block-only: new comments and compatibility reports are automatically `approved`; only users in the block list are rejected
* e2e: added `CPL_ADMIN_GITHUB_IDS` to test server config; made runtime-plugin compilation mandatory in test mode to avoid stale cache; fixed comments center filter/tag balance and admin view test
* CPL-Repo plugin: 215 KiB → 199 KiB (-16 KiB); startup TypeScript: 1,400+ lines → ~750 lines

! 2026.06.09

* Fixed server status probe using static mirror origin instead of configured server origin — switching the database mirror dropdown no longer incorrectly marks the feature server as unavailable
* Added search box to Uninstall tab for quickly finding installed plugins, themes, and languages
* Fixed concurrent deployment failures in GitHub Actions by adding concurrency control to `gh-pages.yml`

! 2026.06.08

* Mirror toolbar layout: status indicators (✓ Static Database, ⚠ Server Unavailable) now display inline with labels; flex-wrap prevents overflow on narrow viewports
* Fixed update list not rendering: replaced `compare:integer:gt[0]` (returns count value, not boolean) with `search[0]then[no]else[yes]` pattern
* Fixed auto-fetch on update tab switch: BackgroundAction `track-filter` now uses `prefix[...]` match to handle `$tabs` macro hash suffixes
* Fixed "查看" button in update notification: removed redundant `cpl-get-plugins-index` call; now navigates directly to update tab and clears notification
* New setting: "Auto-confirm installation during updates" — skips confirmation dialog when enabled (default: off)
* Action buttons consolidation: refresh/update-all buttons moved from global action bar to update-manager sub-tab for better context
* Fixed `getCurrentMirrorApiBase` returning server origin instead of mirror origin for static API calls
* Build status badge auto-clears when switching to a static mirror
* Homepage sorting: removed random shuffle filter — homepage now sorts plugins by download count (stable order, no flickering)
* New `sortbycount` filter operator: sorts plugin tiddlers by download count from cached stats JSON, falls back to alphabetical order when offline
* Download stats in-memory cache: download counts loaded once on cold start, incremented on each download — zero file I/O on API calls
* Optimized `/cpl/stats` API: new `?top=N` parameter for top-N plugins by downloads; response no longer includes `downloadsByIp` (IP history)
* Batched stats fetch: background action requests `?top=200` to reduce payload size instead of fetching all plugins

! 2026.06.07

* Comments Center: submit, view, and reply to comments via GitHub OAuth login; admins can moderate pending comments (approve/reject/delete)
* OAuth security: cryptographically random nonce for state parameter validation to prevent CSRF attacks
* Split static mirror and feature server: database mirror (static) and feature server can now be configured independently
* Batch download stats: multiple plugin stats merged into a single HTTP request with 100ms debounce, dramatically reducing page load requests
* Declarative Wikitext migration: replaced 5 JS fetch handlers with TW native `tm-http-request` + BackgroundAction pattern, reducing ~170 lines of frontend JavaScript
* Removed plugin detail view: clicking plugins now navigates directly to the plugin's own tiddler, eliminating persistent tag nesting bugs and 268 lines of dead code
* Fixed critical CSS bug: empty `.cpl-status-banner` rule caused browsers to discard all subsequent styles, breaking gradients, buttons, and most visual styles
* Fixed `plugin-item` macro navigating to page title instead of `cpl.title`, affecting home gallery and author plugin lists
* Fixed 15+ filter syntax errors (missing/extra `]`) in comments and stats views, eliminating "Filter error: Missing [ in filter expression"
* Fixed build status polling failing for static mirror due to missing mirror type detection
* Optimized default image loading speed
* Improved login error display: explicit error message on 401 instead of perpetual Loading spinner, auto-refresh comments center after login

! 2026.06.01

* Server mirror fallback: iframe bridge timeout now falls back to direct HTTP fetch for static files on server-type mirrors instead of blocking the UI
* Reduced iframe bridge timeout from 15s to 8s for less perceived lag
* Dropdown no longer disabled during data loading — users can switch mirrors anytime
* CPL Server now serves `/repo/` static library route with CORS headers for direct plugin database JSON access
* New setting: "Auto-check for updates when entering CPL layout" (default: off)
* Fixed mirror source being unexpectedly switched when entering CPL layout

! 2026.05.30

* Fixed `plugin.info` `list` field: corrected Settings tab path to `views/system/settings` so it displays in the plugin info panel
* Fixed `readonly-api.ts` metadata: added `platforms: node` to prevent `require("url")` module-not-found errors in browser builds
* Docker deployment support:
  ** `docker-compose.yml` template
  ** `Dockerfile` with read-only mode baked in (`IfEditorMode=no`)
  ** `.dockerignore` / `.gitignore` excluding runtime cache directories

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/docs/readme.title: $:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/docs/readme
$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/docs/readme.caption: <$text text={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[介绍]else[Readme]] }}} />

$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/docs/readme.text:
<$list filter="[[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]]" variable="chinese">

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[yes]]">

> 好用到哭，装就完了!

!! 欢迎使用 CPL!

使用 TW 这么久，你还在为四处寻觅好用的插件而发愁吗？还在为管理一大堆插件的更新、处理插件的依赖而苦恼吗？你还在为查找插件的用法而翻遍全网吗？你是否希望安装一个插件的某个历史版本，而非最新版本？

如果你是插件的作者，你是否还在苦恼如何推广自己的插件，如何让用户及时获得最新的版本呢？

你是否希望 TW 能像其他现代笔记软件一样，能够一键管理所有插件，能够更傻瓜化地查找和安装插件，甚至主动为你推广插件。是否希望 TW 能够帮助你自动保持插件的最新？

这一切，在 CPL 得以实现！

---

CPL 是由[[太微(TiddlyWiki)中文社区|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly]]维护的、致力于搜集网络上所有与 <$text text={{{ TiddlyWiki5 }}}/> 有关插件的、希望为中国以及全世界的太微用户提供一键安装、更新插件体验的插件聚合中心。

本插件有如下特点：

* 聚合各种 TW 插件并保持最新当前 500+;
* 在你的 Wiki 中搜索各种插件，提供关键词、分类和标签搜索;
* 自动检查插件更新;
* 安装插件时可自动递归安装依赖，并可以指定所有插件的安装版本;

</$list>

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[no]]">

> Just install it! I think you need it.

!! Welcome to CPL!

After using TW for so long, are you still worried about looking around for good plugins? Are you still struggling to manage a bunch of plugin updates and deal with plugin dependencies? Are you still searching the web to find out how to use a plugin? Do you want to install some historical version of a plugin instead of the latest version?

If you are a plugin author, do you still struggle with how to promote your plugin and how to keep users up to date with the latest version?

Do you wish TW could manage all your plugins with one click like other modern note-taking software, make it more foolproof to find and install plugins, and even proactively promote plugins for you? Do you want TW to help you keep your plugins up-to-date automatically?

It's all here at CPL!

---

This plugin source is maintained by the [[TiddlyWiki Chinese Community|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly]] and is dedicated to collecting all <$text text={{{ TiddlyWiki5 }}}/> related plugins on the web, hoping to provide a one-click installation and update plugin experience for TW users all around the world.

This plugin has the following features:

* Aggregate various TW plugins and keep them up-to-date with the current 500+;.
* Search for various plugins in your Wiki, providing keyword, category and tag search;.
* Check for plugin updates automatically;
* Install plugins with automatic recursive installation of dependencies, and you can specify the installed version of all plugins;

</$list>

</$list>

\define checkShadow() <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field=<> $subfilter="[]"/> \define uncheckShadow() <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field=<> $subfilter="-[]"/> <$let chinese={{{ [[$:/language]get[text]removeprefix[$:/languages/]else[en-GB]search[zh]then[yes]else[no]] }}}> <$list filter="[match[yes]]"> > 即将卸载 <> <$list filter="[!field:plugin-type[]search:parent-plugin] [!field:plugin-type[]search:dependent] +[limit[1]]" variable="t"> --- !! 注意：插件被依赖 该插件仍然被如下插件依赖，是否继续卸载？ <$list filter="[!field:plugin-type[]search:parent-plugin] [!field:plugin-type[]search:dependent] +[unique[]sort[title]]" variable="other-plugin"> : <> --- !! 注意：残留条目 该插件中，有一些条目已不是默认值(有一个同名的非影子条目)，因此这些条目在删除插件后仍将保留。这可能会为你的 Wiki 增添一些额外的垃圾条目，或者为下一次安装插件或升级插件带来困扰。所以在删除插件时，是否该同时清理这些条目？请选择要删除或者保留的条目，或者点击其标题来产看它的内容来决定。 在决定之后，点击下方的按钮，卸载插件并同时删除勾选的条目。 <$list filter="[match[no]]"> > To uninstall <> <$list filter="[!field:plugin-type[]search:parent-plugin] [!field:plugin-type[]search:dependent] +[limit[1]]" variable="t"> --- !! Note: Plugin is Dependent The plugin is still dependent on the following plugins, do you continue to uninstall? <$list filter="[!field:plugin-type[]search:parent-plugin] [!field:plugin-type[]search:dependent] +[unique[]sort[title]]" variable="other-plugin"> : <> --- !! Note: Left tiddlers The plugin has some entries that are no longer default (there is a non-shadow entry with the same name), so these entries will remain after removing the plugin. This may add some extra junk entries to your Wiki, or cause problems for the next time you install the plugin or upgrade it. So when deleting a plugin, should you clean up these entries at the same time? Please select the entry you want to delete or keep, or click on its title to see what it says to decide. 当 CPL 获取插件数据库经常失败时，你可以尝试切换静态数据库镜像；评论、评分、统计和登录等功能由服务器功能源提供。

欢迎各位大佬部署国内镜像，详情请咨询QQ交流群或在[[GitHub Issue|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TiddlyWiki-CPL/issues]]提问

你可以手动更改数据库镜像入口：[[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-static-repo]]

你也可以单独更改 CPL 服务器功能源：[[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-server-repo]]

; 自动更新检查间隔 <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-update-intervals-minutes" tag="input" default="-1" /> (分钟/次)

<<<
自动更新检查会在 Wiki 刚打开时进行，并每隔指定间隔进行一次检查

显然自动检查需要联网，每次所消耗的流量很小，大概10KB。如果发现有插件可以更新，会在 CPL 面板顶部提醒。

当值小于等于0，则关闭自动更新，也包括刚打开 Wiki 的那一次。

关闭后可以手动在 [[$:/ControlPanel]] 的 [CPL] 中进行检查。
<<<

<$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-load-database-in-cpl-layout"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="yes">
  进入 CPL 布局时自动加载数据库
</$checkbox>

; <$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-check-updates-in-cpl-layout"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="no">
  进入 CPL 布局时自动检查更新
</$checkbox>

; <$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-confirm-install"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="no">
  更新时自动确认安装（跳过确认弹框）
</$checkbox>

; 插件更新筛选器 <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/update-filter" tag="input" default="" />

<<<
插件更新是有选择的，你可以通过修改筛选器来排除一些插件。
<<<

</$list>

<$list filter="[<chinese>match[no]]">

In this page you can set the behavior of the CPL plugin.

; CPL Database Mirror Entry <$select tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-static-repo" field="text">
<$list filter="[{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/static-repos}enlist-input[]]" variable="repo">
<option value=<<repo>>><$text text=<<repo>>/></option>
</$list>
</$select>

; CPL Feature Server <$select tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-server-repo" field="text">
<$list filter="[{$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/server-repos}enlist-input[]]" variable="repo">
<option value=<<repo>>><$text text=<<repo>>/></option>
</$list>
</$select>

<<<
When CPL often fails to fetch the plugin database, you can switch the static database mirror. Comments, ratings, stats, and login are provided by the feature server.

If you'd like to deploy your own mirrors, feel free to ask questions in the [[GitHub Issue|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TiddlyWiki-CPL/issues]]!

You can manually change the database mirror entry: [[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-static-repo]]

You can also configure the CPL feature server independently: [[$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/current-server-repo]]
<<<

; Automatic update of check intervals <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-update-intervals-minutes" tag="input" default="-1" /> (minute(s) per time)

<<<
The automatic update check is performed when the Wiki is first opened, and at specified intervals

Obviously auto-checking requires an internet connection and consumes very little traffic each time, about 10KB. If a plugin is found to be updatable, the CPL panel will show a notice at the top.

When the value is less than or equal to 0, auto-update is turned off, also when the Wiki is just opened.

After closing it can be checked manually in [CPL] of [[$:/ControlPanel]].
<<<

<$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-load-database-in-cpl-layout"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="yes">
  Automatically load the database when entering the CPL layout
</$checkbox>

  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-check-updates-in-cpl-layout"

  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="no">
  Automatically check for updates when entering the CPL layout
</$checkbox>

; <$checkbox
  tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/auto-confirm-install"
  field="text"
  checked="yes"
  unchecked="no"
  default="no">
  Auto-confirm installation during updates (skip confirmation dialog)
</$checkbox>

; Plugin Update Filter <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/Gk0Wk/CPL-Repo/config/update-filter" tag="input" default="" />
